ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "frame_rate" REAL /* Frame rate of the experiment */,
  "worm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worm used in the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worms" (
  "worm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worm */,
  "worm_name" TEXT /* Name of the worm */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the worm */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the worm */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the worm */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genetic makeup of the worm */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the worm */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the worm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "frame_rate" REAL /* Frame rate of the experiment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the frame */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera used to capture the frame */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions during the frame capture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worm_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "worm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worm */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X-position of the worm */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y-position of the worm */,
  "z_position" REAL /* Z-position of the worm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worm_positions_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worm_positions_worm_id FOREIGN KEY ("worm_id") REFERENCES worms ("worm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "velocities" (
  "velocity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each velocity */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "worm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worm */,
  "x_velocity" REAL /* X-velocity of the worm */,
  "y_velocity" REAL /* Y-velocity of the worm */,
  "z_velocity" REAL /* Z-velocity of the worm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("velocity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_velocities_worm_id FOREIGN KEY ("worm_id") REFERENCES worms ("worm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_velocities_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accelerations" (
  "acceleration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acceleration */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "worm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worm */,
  "x_acceleration" REAL /* X-acceleration of the worm */,
  "y_acceleration" REAL /* Y-acceleration of the worm */,
  "z_acceleration" REAL /* Z-acceleration of the worm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acceleration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accelerations_worm_id FOREIGN KEY ("worm_id") REFERENCES worms ("worm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accelerations_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each direction */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "worm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worm */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the worm */,
  "direction_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directions_worm_id FOREIGN KEY ("worm_id") REFERENCES worms ("worm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directions_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data" (
  "experiment_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data of the experiment */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
column_names: ID of the worm used in the experiment
ID of the researcher conducting the experiment
ID of the camera used to capture the frame
Lighting conditions during the frame capture
Institution the user is affiliated with
Last login time of the user
Unique identifier for each experiment data
Unique identifier for each analysis result
